description_long: This is a vintage-style wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and a subtle greenish patina, giving it an aged, antique appearance. The front features ornate decorative carvings on the lower double doors and a single drawer above, both equipped with round metal handles. The top edge is adorned with a scalloped trim, adding to its decorative appeal. The sides and back are plain, with the same wood texture and patina, but lack any additional ornamentation or functional features. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs and has a flat, broad top surface suitable for placing objects. Its overall construction suggests it is solid and robust, designed for freestanding use in an urban environment such as a sidewalk, park, or garage.
description: A vintage wooden cabinet with ornate carvings, a scalloped trim, and a dark brown finish with greenish patina. Features a drawer and double doors with metal handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing ornate carvings, scalloped trim, a single drawer, and double doors with metal handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood panel with scalloped trim at the top and no visible handles or carvings.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a flat, unadorned wooden surface with a consistent patina and no interactive features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with plain wood panel and scalloped trim, lacking handles or carvings.
